actions.intent: Open the visible lower path and expose its dock cost.
Touch the center lane before committing fully to either rescue.
Continue route shaping while keeping dock pressure visible.
Extract the lower puppy after paying the visible route tax.
Break the iced center route and begin the pivot.
Open the center route after the ice break.
Use upper material to keep dock pressure recoverable.
Finish the frozen route pivot and extract the center puppy.

notes: Verified winning route for the current board. Design review note: this mechanically proves a win, but the extraction order is visible path before frozen path, so the board may need tuning if L23 must prove frozen-route-first choice.
